faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Quick answers for new and returning Scrap Mechanic players.

questions.question: What is Scrap Mechanic?
questions.answer: Scrap Mechanic is a creative sandbox and survival game from Axolot Games where players build machines, vehicles, bases, farms, and automated systems from interactive parts.

questions.question: Does Scrap Mechanic have survival mode?
questions.answer: Yes. Survival mode adds resource gathering, farming, bots, raids, crafting, exploration, and progression on top of the building sandbox.

questions.question: Can I play Scrap Mechanic with friends?
questions.answer: Yes. Scrap Mechanic supports co-op multiplayer, and the wiki includes multiplayer and dedicated server guidance for shared worlds.

questions.question: Where should beginners start?
questions.answer: Start with the beginner guide, then learn survival basics, bearings, engines, suspension, and simple vehicle layouts before moving into complex logic builds.

questions.question: Are mods supported?
questions.answer: The Steam Workshop is a major part of the Scrap Mechanic community, with mods, custom parts, maps, and survival-focused add-ons.

cta.title: Ready to build a better machine?
cta.description: Use the guides to plan your survival route, tune your builds, and verify official game information before your next session.
